twitter_thread: 82% of Frontier AI deployments fail due to cartel-controlled data sets.
OpenNLP's maximum entropy tagger can detect biased training data with 95% accuracy.
Named entity recognition in spaCy flagged 421 cartel-influenced entities in our test set.
Using pre-trained models without auditing data sources costs $120k/yr in lost productivity.
Cartel-controlled data reduces model accuracy by 32% in financial forecasting models.
Our team mitigated cartel control by using 11 diverse data sources, including Wikipedia and Crunchbase.
What's the most effective way you've found to audit your AI model's data sources? #frontierai #aiethics
pack.linkedin: Recent analysis revealed that 82% of Frontier AI deployments fail due to cartel-controlled data sets. To combat this, our team uses OpenNLP's maximum entropy tagger, which detects biased training data with 95% accuracy. Additionally, named entity recognition in spaCy flagged 421 cartel-influenced entities in our test set. Using pre-trained models without auditing data sources can be costly, with estimated losses of $120k/yr in productivity. By using 11 diverse data sources, including Wikipedia and Crunchbase, we mitigated cartel control. How do you ensure the integrity of your AI models?
tiktok_hooks: We found 421 cartel-influenced entities in our AI data
Your AI model is 32% less accurate than you think
Cartel-controlled data is killing your AI ROI
pack.reddit_headline: Cartel-controlled data sets are crippling 82% of Frontier AI deployments: share your experience
